← Ontology

Learning_Programs

Parent item
33314415-10e1-8167-8e0e-d1ba6203b515
long_description
Courses, fellowships, and schools concentrate time and structure so that literacy and leadership can deepen beyond one-off events. They are the slow infrastructure of a culture that knows how to read landscapes and institutions together.
slug
Learning_Programs
Activities

Description
Structured educational offerings—such as courses, fellowships, and schools—that deepen regenerative literacy and leadership over time.
